closed_by.COMMENT: Mod who closed the feedback or null if its still open

guild_id.COMMENT: Guild ID subscription is attached to, if any

active.COMMENT: True if the subscription is currently active

manual_expiry_date.COMMENT: If set forces the premium to expire on this date. DOES NOT STOP BILLING!

payment_failed.COMMENT: Set to 1 on payment failed, cleared by payment success

privacy_mode.COMMENT: set to 1 to hide from team hub

games.COMMENT: Number of concurrent active games in progress

roles.COMMENT: Space separated list of roles for the user on the guild
